title: Canada Life Co-op Student IT Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# Canada Life Co-op Student IT Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Canada Life Co-op Student IT internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Toronto, ON
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Canada Life
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Canada Life is offering a Co-op Student IT internship position in Toronto, ON. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Canada Life's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Canada Life interview and increase your chances of success.
